title: Auth to gcp artifiact registry not working with docker auth file
body: **Description** Im building a docker image that inside the docker file we have a FROM statement that refers to private image on private registry (gcp artifiact registry) i have a config.json from docker that have the credentials that needs to be used in order to access (username and password) the entry on the config.json (not real password): **Steps to reproduce the issue:** The command i used: ``` /usr/bin/sudo /usr/bin/buildah bud -f /runner/_work/audit/test/build/Dockerfile --build-arg REGISTRY_URL=us-docker.pkg.dev/test/r --format docker --tls-verify=false --log-level debug --authfile /home/runner/.docker/config.json ``` **Describe the results you received:** the message i get when debug: ``` "No credentials for us-docker.pkg.dev found" ``` **Describe the results you expected:** I expected the authentication will work and it will find the credentials inside the file **Output of `buildah version`:** ``` 1.23.1 ```
